choicesItalian: Vorrei restituire questo maglione che ho comprato ieri.
Voglio un gelato alla fragola con panna.
Dov'è il negozio di abbigliamento più vicino?
choicesEnglish: I'd like to return this sweater that I bought yesterday.
I want a strawberry ice cream with cream.
Where is the nearest clothing store?
How much is this blue t-shirt?

correctAnswerEnglish: I'd like to return this sweater that I bought yesterday.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Frase di apertura tratta dal dialogo.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Opening phrase from the dialogue.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, he wants to return the sweater.

choicesEnglish: Is there any problem with the item?
Do you like the new sweater?
Who sold this dress?
Do you come to this shop often?

correctAnswerEnglish: Is there any problem with the item?

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Domanda del commesso per indagare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiede se c'è un problema.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, he's asking if there's a problem.

choicesItalian: C'è un piccolo buco sulla manica sinistra.
Il maglione è troppo lungo per me.
Non mi piace il colore verde.
choicesEnglish: There's a small hole on the left sleeve.
The sweater is too long for me.
I don't like the green color.
I've already used it many times.

correctAnswerEnglish: There's a small hole on the left sleeve.

feedback.incorrectItalian: No, parla del buco sulla manica.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it mentions the hole on the sleeve.

choicesItalian: Mi dispiace molto, ha lo scontrino?
Tutto bene, vuole un altro regalo?
choicesEnglish: I'm very sorry, do you have the receipt?
All good, do you want another gift?
It costs ten euros, can you pay?

correctAnswerEnglish: I'm very sorry, do you have the receipt?

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Richiesta del documento di acquisto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Request for the purchase document.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, he's asking for the receipt.

choicesItalian: Forse è nella borsa di mia moglie.
Non so cosa sia uno scontrino.
choicesEnglish: Yes, here it is, I kept it.
No, I threw it away yesterday.
Maybe it's in my wife's bag.
I don't know what a receipt is.
correctAnswerItalian: Sì, eccolo qui, l'ho tenuto.
correctAnswerEnglish: Yes, here it is, I kept it.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Conferma del possesso dello scontrino.
feedback.correctEnglish: Good! Confirmation of having the receipt.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, he's handing over the receipt.

choicesEnglish: Do you prefer to exchange it for an identical one?
Do you want to go home now?
Do you need a large bag?
Who made this package?
correctAnswerItalian: Preferisce cambiarlo con uno identico?
correctAnswerEnglish: Do you prefer to exchange it for an identical one?

feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, he's offering an identical exchange.

choicesItalian: Se ne avete un altro preferirei il cambio.
No, voglio i soldi indietro subito.
choicesEnglish: If you have another one I'd prefer the exchange.
No, I want the money back right away.
I'll take another different model.
I don't want anything, thanks.
correctAnswerItalian: Se ne avete un altro preferirei il cambio.
correctAnswerEnglish: If you have another one I'd prefer the exchange.

choicesItalian: Dovrei cambiare questo paio di scarpe.
choicesEnglish: I should exchange this pair of shoes.

feedback.correctItalian: Bene! Nuovo caso di cambio merce.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, he has to exchange the shoes.

choicesItalian: Il numero è troppo piccolo per me.

choicesEnglish: The size is too small for me.

The shoes are very dirty.
I lost a shoe on the street.

correctAnswerEnglish: The size is too small for me.

choicesEnglish: I would need 39, I took 38.

correctAnswerEnglish: I would need 39, I took 38.

choicesEnglish: I'm going to see in the warehouse.

choicesEnglish: Is it possible to get a refund?

choicesEnglish: It's okay anyway, I'll take it.

correctAnswerEnglish: It's okay anyway, I'll take it.

choicesItalian: Non è proprio il mio stile, posso cambiarla?

correctAnswerEnglish: It's not really my style, can I exchange it?

correctAnswerEnglish: Certainly, if you have the gift receipt.
